title: Jazz in Marciac
summary: Jazz in Marciac (JIM) is an annual jazz festival that takes place in Marciac, Occitania, France. The festival takes place over a period of three weeks, usually from late July to mid-August. The first festival took place in 1978.
text:
Jazz in Marciac (JIM) is an annual jazz festival that takes place in Marciac, Occitania, France. The festival takes place over a period of three weeks, usually from late July to mid-August. The first festival took place in 1978.
